detaileddescription.para: Instance of the subsystem that created this interface

memberdef.argsstring: (FPlatformUserId PlatformId, const FString &PlayerName, const FString &Credentials, const FOnVoiceChatLoginCompleteDelegate &Delegate) override
memberdef.name: Login

memberdef.name: JoinChannel

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &ChannelName, const FVector &SpeakerPosition, const FVector &ListenerPosition, const FVector &ListenerForwardDirection, const FVector &ListenerUpDirection) override
memberdef.name: Set3DPosition

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &ChannelName, EVoiceChatChannelType ChannelType, TOptional< FVoiceChatChannel3dProperties > Channel3dProperties=TOptional< FVoiceChatChannel3dProperties >()) override
